name: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Ports
notes: This Building Block triggers when a communication using a common cryptocurrency mining port is detected.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Ports on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the destination is Remote
when the destination port is one of the following 65530, 65531, 65532, 65533, 3333, 4444, 5555, 7777, 9999, 45700, 8333, 8124, 9333
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Ports on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the destination is Remote
